name: nextjs-clean-skills
description: Next.js 16 skills for Hybrid Clean Architecture and React Server/Client Component design.

interface.longDescription: Codex skills for applying a Next.js 16 Hybrid Clean Architecture profile: server-only DAL reads, Server Actions, Cache Components, client server-state boundaries, and React Server/Client Component rules.
defaultPrompt: Design this Next.js feature with Hybrid Clean Architecture.
Create this React component with the correct Server/Client boundary.
